symptom: what felt like a stubborn urine infection and a dull ache in the side that would not quit
hook: the kidney was puffed up and fizzing with gas like a slice of half melted Swiss cheese
whatYouSee: A kidney bubbling and fizzing with gas like Swiss cheese.
whyItMatters: Gas forming bacteria are destroying the kidney from inside and it can kill fast without urgent treatment.
treatment: It needs urgent antibiotics drainage and sometimes removal of the kidney.
takeaway: Gas bubbling through the kidney is emphysematous pyelonephritis.
